page.title: Choose a subscription plan
page.heroSubtitle: Upgrade to unlock full features for {{storeName}}.
page.inactiveNotice: The current store does not have a Trial or Active plan yet. Please choose a plan below to get started.

planCard.writeReview: Write a review for this plan

sepayDialog.title: QR Payment (SePay)
sepayDialog.description: Scan the QR code or transfer money using the details below. After payment, click the check status button to let the system refresh your plan automatically.

reviewDialog.title: Review plan {{planName}}
reviewDialog.description: Share your SaaS experience to help other store owners evaluate.
reviewDialog.contentPlaceholder: What type of stores is this plan suitable for? What are the pros and cons?

toasts.refreshAccessError: Cannot refresh access. Please sign in again.
toasts.paymentInitError: Cannot initiate payment. Please try again.
toasts.paymentStatusPending: Payment is still pending. Please wait a bit and try again.
toasts.paymentStatusFailed: Payment failed. Please try again or choose another method.
toasts.noPaymentId: No payment id found to check status.
toasts.loadError: Failed to load data. Please try again.
toasts.submitReviewSuccess: Your plan review has been submitted. Thank you!
toasts.submitReviewError: Cannot submit review. Please try again.
